metadata.title:
W.W.P. KILLED


THE GOOSE

CORPORATION REQUEST FOR
FREE CITY WATER PUTS
END TO USE BY ALL CON-
TRACTORS WITHOUT PAYING
FEES.

pages.raw_text:
No more free water will be al
lowed contractors and builders in
the city, whether the work is being
done for the city or not. This is
the decision of Commissioner John
Wetzel, who stated this afternoon
that all contractors hereafter will
have to pay the city for water used
on street improvements and other
jobs.


The matter was brought to fc-
Gus this morning when the Wash-
ington Water Power Co. asked for
free city water in one of its under.
ground workings. Mr.. WetZel
stated that he knew no good reason
why the city should furnish the
water free and 1t is now up to the
board to state how much shall ba
paid. The contractors on street
improvements, including sidewalk
ing and curbing, have heretofore
used city water free.
